title: Bundlex
description: BundleX is a lightweight client-side mod that improves Bundle tooltips by showing real contents instead of +N compression, with proper full-item navigation across all displayed items.
body:
# BundleX

A focused client-side QoL mod that makes **Bundle tooltips** clear, readable, and practical in real gameplay.

## Why BundleX?
Vanilla Bundle tooltips can hide many entries behind a compact `+N` counter.  
BundleX replaces that compressed view with real visible item entries, so you can inspect contents quickly and confidently.

## What BundleX Improves
- Shows actual Bundle contents instead of `+N` compression
- Keeps selection/navigation behavior consistent across displayed entries
- Preserves Minecraft’s visual style while improving readability
- Lightweight client-side enhancement for everyday use

# Screenshots
## Before
![Before](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1436778576442691595/1487367691214782494/image_2026-03-28_112804424.png?ex=69c8e29b&is=69c7911b&hm=cece95a0dd19f1d81f0decae9bb5aefa7abcacc10e2871e8e842bdf9731a12c6&)
## After
![After](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1472691108524982315/1484473843509628958/image.png?ex=69be5b80&is=69bd0a00&hm=443b11c579b180d6421b26ae0eb7cf8a44907ec75d4f517f1a88bee4a743e210)

## Compatibility
- Minecraft: `1.21.2-1.21.11` (set your exact version in Modrinth)
- Loader: `Fabric`
- Environment: `Client-side`
